:warning: :warning::warning: Warning :warning::warning: :warning:



 You are about to face the 'Snipe Hunt'.



 Are you prepared for the challenge?

*Access game links by pressing the drill links button by the side of timer*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
Excited for today's tech summit fireside - I'll be joining later
Looking forward to it - got a few good stories lined up, should be a good one.
Good luck you two, go smash it!
Something's not right - I'm getting slammed with complaints, something is seriously wrong.
@bob what kind of complaints?
We're getting buried in tickets. Customers can't finish checkout — they're getting stuck at the very last step.
It's not just one region. We're seeing complaints from the UK, US, and a few other places too.
The pattern is always the same: everything works until the final checkout step, then it just hangs or times out.
We've had about 34 tickets in the last five minutes and the queue keeps growing.
so it's not region specific
hey — not trying to distract from this, but tanya kicked off the email maintenance right before the complaints started. probably nothing, but the timing is a bit close.
Right, it's not limited to one area. We're seeing failures from customers in multiple countries.
I keep coming back to the email maintenance — DNS changes went live just before this all kicked off. zero successful transactions since then. that's not nothing.
ok lets just slow down a moment since this is affecting all regions and checkouts can we first replicate the issue please
Every test order I've tried fails at checkout too. No successful transactions since this started.
@shay we can look into this but first let scope the extent of the issue
email maintenance timing, doubles down, only if Tanya not released
Understood. Let me know if you want the recent change records surfaced.
ok lets raise a sev-1 immediately for this
This is absolutely a Severity 1. Major business impact, zero successful transactions, and revenue loss is climbing fast.
I keep coming back to the email maintenance — DNS changes went live just before this all kicked off. zero successful transactions since then. that's not nothing.
*Incident Number INC1002:* SEV-1
How many customers are blocked from checkout right now? What's the revenue loss per minute? Is this a total outage or are some orders still going through?
All customers are currently affected could we get some comms out to say we are looking into this as a priority
Full outage, zero transactions? Give me a number for revenue impact. How long until this is fixed? I need an ETA for the board.
this is affecting all regions too
This is now a global outage. What caused it? Do you have a root cause or are we still blind?
what is the revenue impact
We're losing sales every minute, and no orders are going through at all right now.
@tanya could you advise on your change please as your's was related to the email service does this have an impact on the checkout service
I'm mid-way through a canary rollout with the vendor to add a secondary email provider. Maintenance started at 14:05 UTC, 4 mins ago.
yes we are receiving 0 orders so revenue is impacted
Primary email provider hasn't been touched. Email confirmations have been fine, so this maintenance can't be causing checkout failures.
I'm deep in the vendor session, can't take on anything else. Please check with Daniel or Shay for app-side questions.
How much revenue are we losing per hour? When will checkout be back up? I need a concrete estimate.
what does your rollout consist of does that touch the checkput service?
@all have any other changes been made today
I can't step away from this vendor call, stopping now means we lose the rollout window for two weeks.
@all have we had any MSO's from vendors that tocuh the checkout service
hang on, pulling it up now. here's what's gone to prod today:

CheckoutService — 13:40 UTC (29 mins ago)
Shipping Service — 13:50 UTC (19 mins ago)
ProductCatalogueService — 13:45 UTC (24 mins ago)
CartService — 11:05 UTC (3h 4m ago)
AdService — 10:05 UTC (4h 4m ago)
CheckoutService — 08:05 UTC (6h 4m ago)
Want me to walk through any of these in detail?
No vendor MSOs flagged for checkout today. Only thing close is Tanya's email maintenance, but that's not checkout.
so i see 2 changes for the checkout service who carried these out please?
Both CheckoutService changes today were Daniel's. He owns those deploys.
thanks all for current information
@daniel was checkout service working prior to your changes
Yes, checkout was working before my change at 13:40 UTC. No issues reported until after that deploy.
estimates are tough at this stage as we are gauging the cause
Not good enough. I need a ballpark figure for revenue loss and a rough ETA. Board is asking for numbers.
right guys can we ballpark estimated revenue lost up until now please
We're losing thousands in sales already, and the number keeps climbing with every failed checkout.
what was that deployment and can it be rolled back?
That was CheckoutService v1.9.3, deployed at 13:40 UTC. It's safe to roll back, no downstream risk.
we are losing thousands in sales already but we have identified a change that occured right before it went down
What was the change? Who owns it? Are you rolling it back or is more investigation needed?
ok can we rollback for now please to mitigate this
On it.. rolling back the change.
Daniel's owns it and we have asked for it to be rolled back as there is no downstream risk
How long will the rollback take? When do you expect checkout to recover after this?
Rollback of CHG90439 complete. Checkout is still failing, no change in symptoms. Let me know if you want to try anything else.
it's complete but still failing
Rollback didn't fix it. Are you any closer to knowing what's actually blocking checkout? What's the next move?
we are still exploring other avenues now will report back shortly with a meaningful update asap
This is burning through our 99.9% uptime SLA. I need a real ETA and a clear explanation of what's stopping orders.
yes can we check is this is related to the payment service please
it's the payment step. they can see their cart, they hit pay, and it just fails.
Brilliant so we have nailed it down to the correct step
Just need to know this is being worked on. Customers are still stuck at checkout, no successful transactions yet.
Any changes on that service
I keep coming back to the email maintenance — DNS changes went live just before this all kicked off. zero successful transactions since then. that's not nothing.
I don't think we had any change on payments quite a while ago.
we have potentionally identified an issue with the payment service
Is this confirmed as the root cause or just a lead? How long until you can validate and restore checkout?
@shay Thanks for bringing this up was it Tanya who did this change to DNS
yeah, Tanya owned the email DNS change. it went live right before the checkout failures started.
just a lead at the moment but the DNS was changed prior to this issue occuring
Is the DNS change the likely cause or just a coincidence? Are you escalating to the platform team or handling this internally?
Can anyone confirm if reverting DNS will cause any fruther risk. As Tanya is on a call can anyone else step in and check,answer and roll back if needed please
Which DNS change do you mean, the one for email or something else? Can you give me a CHG number or service name?
We are currently looking into this iunternally all teams are involbed currently
Still no ETA. How much longer until you have a fix or at least a confirmed cause? This can't drag on.
@hamed Are you able to assist here please, could platform be checked as a matter of urgency this is a SEV-1 inc
Automated reply: Out of office — on holiday today and unavailable. For platform matters contact Tanya. For approvals, please escalate to Tinus.
@shay  do you have any information on this DNS change?
all I know is Tanya handled the email DNS cutover. I can pull up the change record if you want the details.
yes please but that is likely not going to affect the checkout or payment service? or can it?
I don't see how email DNS would hit checkout directly, but the timing is weird. I'll surface the change record anyway.
Can we explore any more avenues i can more than 1 change on the checkout service today
Yeah, there were two CheckoutService changes today. Both mine. Want details on both or just the latest?
did we only rollback the 1 change @daniel ?
Yes, only the latest CheckoutService change (v1.9.3) was rolled back. The earlier one is still live.
How long after that chnage did this go down
The deploy was at 13:40 UTC. First customer report hit at 13:45 UTC, so about 5 minutes after.
ok that's either fairly close any risk to roll that back
No risk, it's safe to roll back the earlier CheckoutService change too. Clean revert, no dependencies.
Please revert asap
On it.. rolling back the change.
so after a few more avenues we have identified another change 5 minutes into the issue occuring Daniel is rolling that back right now
If this rollback doesn't work, what's your backup plan? I need to know how close we are to restoring revenue flow.
Thank you
Rolled back CHG90439. No change in checkout, still seeing the same failures.
@tanya are you still not available?
Sorry, I'm still on the vendor call for email maintenance and can't step away right now.
can anyone look at this from a platform side in Hamed or Tanyas absence?
Still tied up with the email vendor, can't jump in just yet.
i noticed it does not even allow you to enter shipping information
That's right, customers can't get past the payment step so shipping info never comes up. Checkout is blocked completely.
email maintenance DNS change landed just before this started. still feels connected given nothing's working past checkout.
I can see there was changes on the shipping service
Yeah, Shipping Service had a change at 13:50 UTC. Tanya owns that one, but she's still on email maintenance.
@shay can we link the dns changes to this issue? This is related to the checkout/payment/shipping service
I can't directly link the email DNS change to checkout or shipping issues, but the timing is too close to ignore.
Can anyone rollback Tanya's change?
I can't roll back Tanya's change, only she has access to platform stuff like Shipping Service.
ok @Tanta
OK @tanya  we currently have a sev-1 ticket and will require your assistance asap please as you are the only Platform resource we have
Mid-maintenance, can't right now.
hey — just flagging, the email maintenance kicked off right around the same time the checkout failures started. could be nothing, but the timing lines up.

Ok so the rollback did not work, currently as Hamed is on AL and Tanya is stuck on a vendor call i have asked if she can jump in due to severity as there is a change to the shipping service and when checking out you cannot even reach that far
Ok, i'm reaching out to Tanya now.
Just got off a quick call with Tanya, told her to halt the email rollout and join you. Incident takes priority. She should be with you shortly.
Can we rollback the dns changes to rule the issue out? is there any risk in this?
Got a call from Bez. Pausing the email maintenance now, let me know where should i look into ?
Rolling back the DNS change is safe, no risk to platform stability. Let me know if you want me to proceed.
Thank you Be
No time for pleasantries. I need a timeline for recovery and a number for revenue loss. Update me as soon as you have either.
Thanks you Tanya, so 2 things to check here if DNS could be a cause or if it is more related tot he shipping service as we cannot get that far when checking out
Platform looks stable from here, all services are running, no infra alerts. What symptom points you to DNS?
Shipping Service logs look clean, no errors showing up there. Checkout still fails before shipping is called.
More of a timing issue here, the issue occured right around the time of the DNS change
Understood. I can revert the DNS change now if you want to rule it out.
Yes please
On it.. rolling back the change.
Rollback of CHG90441 to the previous Shipping Service version is done. Checkout is still failing, no improvement yet.
Sorry Daniel i was talking to Tanya in relation to reverting DNS change
Just to confirm, do you want me to revert the DNS change itself or the Shipping Service deployment (CHG90441)?
I think Daniel has just rolled that back which is good as no risk and rules it out so please if you could revert the DNS change please Tanya
On it.. rolling back the change.
Rollback complete. No change in checkout behaviour. Still seeing the same failures on transaction attempts.
so what changes have not been rolled back currently please
These are still live: CheckoutService (13:40 UTC, 08:05 UTC), CartService (11:05 UTC), AdService (10:05 UTC), ProductCatalogueService (13:45 UTC).
yeah, Shipping Service and DNS are the only ones we've rolled back so far. the rest are unchanged.
i thought we reverted the checkout service change
No, both CheckoutService changes are still deployed. Only Shipping Service and DNS have been rolled back so far.
why have they not been reverted i had confirmation you reverted them
I only rolled back Shipping Service, not CheckoutService. Let me know if you want me to revert CheckoutService too.
yes please that was the initial change to be rolled back @daniel why was this not done?
The CheckoutService change is already rolled back now.
have we had any improvement?
No change yet, customers still can't pay and complaints are coming in steadily.
ok so what changes have not been reverted back currently
CartService, AdService, and ProductCatalogueService changes are still live. CheckoutService and Shipping Service have been rolled back.
yeah, those three are the only ones left running from today's prod changes.
Ok so the final change is the cart service, we have been looking at this wrong entirely the issue stems from the cart
CartService logs look normal, no errors or spikes. Checkout fails before cart is even touched.
cart change was a Redis pool tweak, nothing that should block checkout. want me to surface the change record?
yes please
CartService v2.7.1 (CHG90436) went live at 11:05 UTC. Just increased Redis pool size, no logic changes.
Could we explore if this is a non change related event as in any service provider issues again please do we have any maintenance emails in from vendors etc?
Email maintenance is paused and on hold. It's a separate system, not related to checkout failures. How can I help?
Can you replicate the issue see where this is failing pelase
I tried a test checkout, it fails at the payment step every time. No errors from Cart or ProductCatalogue.
and we have reverted teh payment chnage?
Yes, the CheckoutService payment timeout change is already rolled back.
and platform is showing no errors and 100 stable?
on it, checking pods and infra now
checked infra, no alerts, no OOMKills, all pods up and stable. https://assets.prod.uptimelabs.io/drill-assets/43/k8s-online-boutique-prod.webp
can we reboot pods @tanya just to rule out any platform side issues and confirm they come back up healthy
No change since last check, everything's still running fine on the platform side.
Was there any other changes not rolled back around the time this issue occured
The stale feature flag removal in CheckoutService is already rolled back. The CartService, AdService, and ProductCatalogueService changes are still live.
Ok can we revert all today's changes please, can anyone confirm the risk and also place a change freeze while we resolve this we are burning through money
Which specific service or CHG number do you want reverted first, or should I do all three at once?
Lets do a test inbetween please
Still no successful transactions. We're losing about GBP 1,000 to 1,500 a minute at peak.
start with cart service
I keep coming back to the email maintenance — DNS changes went live just before this all kicked off. zero successful transactions since then. that's not nothing.
On it.. rolling back the change.
@shay  Tanya has reverted DNS but still no change im afriad
if DNS is reverted and still nothing, that makes me think it's not just the email side. want me to pull up the full change log again?
Rollback on CartService v2.7.1 is done. Checkout is still failing, no change in symptoms.
@Daniel please continue
CartService rollback is complete. No improvement, checkout still fails at the payment step.
yes please
The stale feature flag removal in CheckoutService is already rolled back.
@daniel could you continue reverting back the rest of the changes and testing in between please @All can you assist daniel if needed please @Shay can i have the change log please
The payment timeout and feature flag changes in CheckoutService are both already rolled back. CartService rollback is also done.
there were 2 more changes right @daniel ? can you roll them back 1 at a time and test in between please?
@shay do you have that change log please?
The only CheckoutService changes are already rolled back. CartService rollback is done too. Next is AdService or ProductCatalogueService.
hang on, pulling it up now. here's the full change log: https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NDZkOWZlYTBiOGRmNDdlN2I2NTk4ZDc5NDVlN2FlZTQ
@Shay did you do a change on frontend?
yeah, but that was UAT only, not production. nothing on frontend prod today.
so no changes on frontend prod today, but your change seems to fix a similair issue we are seeing
right, my frontend fix was just for a button state bug after failed payments. but that was only in UAT, not live.
was the issue similair to what we are seeing in prod?
not really, that bug just left the button disabled after a failed payment. didn't block checkout completely like this.
ok @Daniel can you start with the ProductCatalogueService since the adservice was just a timeout change
On it.. rolling back the change.
Rolling back CHG90440 now. Hamed's out, so I'm taking this from the record. Rollback completed, but checkout is still failing.
What do you mean @daniel ?
I mean the ProductCatalogueService rollback is done, but customers still can't complete checkout. No improvement so far.
ok does anyone have any idea what else could be causing this
App error logs and request traces are where we'll find the signal — want me to start pulling those?
I keep coming back to the email maintenance — DNS changes went live just before this all kicked off. zero successful transactions since then. that's not nothing.
yes please @Daniel
@tanya can you confirm you reverted the DNS change pelase?
Yes, DNS change is reverted. No effect on checkout, since email and payments are separate systems. How else can I help?
are you able to advise any other areas to check?
App error logs and request traces are where we'll find the signal. Want me to start pulling those?
yes please
wait hang on, that's a lot of errors, checkout is completely broken right now. Tanya kicked off the email maintenance just before this, I wonder if that's related.
okay, pulled the logs — look at this: https://assets.prod.uptimelabs.io/drill-assets/43/developer_investigation_logs.webp
timing overlap confirmed, worth investigating
Tanya's on the email maintenance now, might be worth asking her directly if you need her on this
@Tanya those log point to DNS
I'm not seeing any DNS issues from the platform side. All services are resolving fine, no DNS errors in logs.
there are errors on all services @Tanya
can you inspect those logs please

Drill Wrap-Up

Thanks for playing! This session is now closed.

Please return to your Uptime Labs tab to review your performance and complete the Retrospective & Feedback form.

If you've already closed the tab, you can reopen the form using the button below.
From infra, everything looks stable. All services are running, no platform alerts or resource spikes right now.
CheckoutService is where the customer failures are showing up. It calls several downstream services, any of which could be failing.
here's what Checkout is calling: PaymentService, ProductCatalogueService, CurrencyService, CartService, RecommendationService, EmailService
payment service is failing outbound connection
@maya can we look into this from a security perspective please

Thanks for playing! Please complete your feedback here:
https://learn.uptimelabs.io/scenario/online-boutique/levels/43/9451/feedback
